description: Update the data center rack elevation diagram for Rack A-07 in '~/Diagrams/rack_a07.drawio' based on the physical inventory change log found in '~/Desktop/rack_a07_changes.txt'. The updated diagram must reflect the removal of 'DB-REPLICA-01' (U9-U10), the addition of new devices (DB-REPLICA-02, SW-DIST-01, APP-API-01, APP-API-02, Patch Panel) at their designated U-positions, and the relocation of the Cable Management Panel. Equipment should be color-coded by type (Red=Power, Blue=Network, Green=Compute, Orange=Database). Include a second page titled 'Power Budget' containing a table of power consumption data from the change log. Export the complete multi-page diagram to '~/Diagrams/exports/rack_a07_audit.pdf', ensuring all labels match the hostnames in the log exactly.
